name: B.S. And C.P. Hospitals Employees
description_short: Member-owned federal credit union in Bronx, NY serving healthcare employees and families since 1971 with $981K in assets and 500+ members.
description_long: BS and CP Hospitals Employees Federal Credit Union was established in 1971 as a member-owned financial cooperative headquartered in Bronx, New York. The institution has maintained continuous operations for over 50 years, serving a dedicated membership base within the healthcare industry. With $981,000 in total assets and more than 500 active members, the credit union operates as a smaller regional institution focused on personalized service to its specific membership community. The credit union offers standard banking services typical of financial cooperatives, including membership accounts and financial services accessible to healthcare employees and their immediate family members. Members can access banking services through two physical branch locations: the main office at 1500 Waters Place in Bronx and a secondary branch in Tomkins Cove, NY. The institution provides phone-based customer support and maintains an online presence for member inquiries and service requests. What distinguishes this credit union is its narrow membership focus on employees of BS and CP Hospitals and their families, creating a tight-knit member community with shared workplace connections. This specialization allows the institution to tailor services toward healthcare worker needs and financial circumstances. The 50+ year operational history demonstrates institutional stability and commitment to serving its specific member demographic over multiple decades. Prospective members should understand that this is a very small credit union with limited assets compared to larger financial institutions, which may constrain product offerings and technological capabilities. The two-location branch network covers only the Bronx and Tomkins Cove areas, limiting physical access for members outside these regions. Membership eligibility is restricted to healthcare employees of BS and CP Hospitals and their immediate families, so this institution is not an option for the general public.
services: Banking services for healthcare industry employees
In-person banking at physical branch locations
Family membership accounts for immediate relatives
Branch services at Bronx headquarters location
Branch services at Tomkins Cove satellite location
Online member contact and communication options
pros: Member-owned cooperative structure where members have ownership stake and voting rights
50+ year operational history since 1971 demonstrates institutional stability and continuity
Serves specific healthcare worker community with tailored financial services
Membership extended to immediate family members of current healthcare employees
Two physical branch locations in Bronx and Tomkins Cove for in-person service
Accessible phone support at (718) 862-5042 for member inquiries
Low membership barrier—open to healthcare workers and their families
cons: Very small institution with only $981K in assets, limiting product diversity and technology investment
Restricted membership eligibility—only healthcare employees of BS and CP Hospitals and their families qualify
Limited geographic footprint with only two branch locations serving Bronx and Tomkins Cove areas
Minimal online information about specific services, rates, or account products available
Small member base (500+) may result in fewer competitive advantages than larger credit unions
best_for: BS and CP Hospitals healthcare employees seeking member-owned banking with shared workplace community
Immediate family members of healthcare workers at BS and CP Hospitals looking for credit union membership
Healthcare workers in Bronx and Tomkins Cove areas needing in-person branch access
Members prioritizing relationship banking and personalized service over product breadth
diagnosis: Best for healthcare employees of BS and CP Hospitals and their immediate family members seeking small-institution credit union banking with local branch access in the Bronx or Tomkins Cove areas. Primary limitation is restricted membership eligibility and minimal asset base, making this institution unavailable to the general public and potentially limiting product offerings compared to larger credit unions.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
